title: Digital Game Design Mission and Vision
content:
Digital Game Design Mission and Vision

Mission and Vision of Digital Game Design Department

Mission:

The main mission of the department is to train students who are well-equipped both theoretically and practically in the field of digital game design. The curriculum of the department has been created in a way that theory and practice are intertwined in line with this mission.

Vision:

In the department of Digital Game Design, students are aimed to be educated with wide knowledge and skills in digital game design. It is aimed that the department, which uses digital communication technologies at the highest capacity, will earn international recognition with its sound and well-equipped academic staff and exceptional graduates.
